title: Language Change
scenario: Language change for voice prompts via Device Settings > Language applies correctly after firmware update in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Select a new language from the list (e.g., French, German, Spanish).
5. Observe the popup informing that a software update is required to apply the language change.
7. Wait for the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process to complete. Do not disconnect or power off the device during the update.
8. After the update finishes, reconnect to the device if necessary.
9. Trigger various voice prompts and alerts (e.g., make an incoming call to hear "Incoming call from [Contact]", press the Mute button to hear "Mute on").
expected: All voice prompts and alerts are spoken in the newly selected language after the firmware update completes.
